item.title: Trump threatens to 'obliterate' Iranian oil and energy sites if it refuses deal to end war
item.description: As thousands more US troops arrive in the Middle East, Donald Trump threatens to wipe out Iran's energy plants and oil wells if it does not reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: 80,000 Australian kids aged five and under not up to date with vaccinations
item.description: The latest immunisation data shows more than 80,000 Australian children aged five and under are not fully up to date with their vaccinations.
